summary: Resolves account-update destinations and constructs deterministic Slack-ready delivery_payload objects without changing the reusable workflow logic.

required_env.name: SLACK_DEFAULT_CHANNEL_ID
required_env.description: Default Slack destination when no route override exists.

required_env.name: SLACK_SUMMARY_CHANNEL_ID
required_env.description: Summary channel used for operational run reporting.

mapping_files.purpose: Maps account, segment, and workflow routing hints into Slack destinations and fallback behavior.

fixtures.notes: Routes a known account to its preferred destination and emits a stable dedupe key.

notes: Routing defaults belong in the pack and customer config, not in the workflow JSON.
Use aliases or logical destination names in certification fixtures when a real channel ID is not available.
